parameters: Mngh... I can't die until I complete my mission... Zzz...
Mrgh... If only she weren't here...
Those damn demons! Kill them all!
Those worthless slaves have lost their nerve and are blocking the
way! Forward! We'll kill them first!
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
Oh, you made it here! We've memorized the surrounding terrain!
Now we'll be able to take you straight here from the world map!
Need a high-speed lift to another country?
Let's do it, Your Majesty! Let's rebuild our peaceful country!
We'll obey any order you give us! For the sake of Lace!
